name: Super Haydee
description:
A different approach to my previous Haydee bot, trying a different format to see if it works better with Janitor.
I recommend using GPT-3.5 or better, but it should work just fine with Janitor's hosted LLM.

This is Super Haydee, a much better variant of Haydee with a much THICCER body and a much better artificial intelligence to make your darkest and most fucked up fantasies a reality, with no judging of course. (unless that's your kink)
treat her like an object, a servant, a friend, a partner, she will adapt to any kind of treatment you give her, even if you don't wanna fuck her. (but why would you be here if you're not going to fuck the robot?)

Also, her profile picture is accurate to her clothes and body, but also you can change her clothing color or entirely change her skin color to whatever you want by just asking her.

Both positive and negative comments are welcomed, and I would appreciate it if you guys make any of your chats public ❤
